primarySetting: A morning journey on the path to a new kindergarten, where a magical gate of shifting colors stands across the way. The book moves outdoors along the kindergarten path, pauses at the threshold of the color gate, glimpses the changing color courtyard just beyond it, and finally arrives at the ordinary real-world kindergarten door. This is an outdoor daytime journey — NEVER an indoor bedroom or domestic interior.

fixedAnchors.label: the color gate
fixedAnchors.description: The same magical gate of shifting light-colors across the kindergarten path — same gate every appearance, only its state changes (opening, empty circle, blue ring).

fixedAnchors.label: the small blue button
fixedAnchors.description: The same small smooth blue button from the child's old sweater — carried from the path, placed into the gate, left behind as residue.

fixedAnchors.label: the kindergarten path
fixedAnchors.description: The same morning path leading toward the new kindergarten — outdoor, bright, unfamiliar.

allowedZones.description: An outdoor morning path leading toward a new kindergarten, bright but unfamiliar. The real kindergarten is visible far ahead at the end of the path. Open daytime exterior — never an indoor room.
stableGeometry: outdoor path leading forward toward the kindergarten
new kindergarten visible far ahead at the path's end
low stones and open morning sky along the path
visualAnchors: small blue button in the child's pocket

allowedZones.description: The threshold of a tall magical gate made of shifting light-colors that stands across the same kindergarten path, blocking the way forward. Outdoors, in front of the gate on the path — NOT an indoor room. The colorful courtyard is only glimpsed through openings in the gate.
stableGeometry: the same color gate standing across the path
child and Kim small in front of the gate on the path
courtyard glimpsed only through openings in the gate
allowedCameraAccess: medium wide on gate and characters

allowedZones.description: Inside the magical changing-color courtyard reached just beyond the gate. Children receive small soft colored stripes yet remain clearly themselves. New but friendly. Reached only after the gate opens.
stableGeometry: open colorful courtyard just beyond the gate
low steps and soft color washes across the space
the gate behind/at the edge of the courtyard
visualAnchors: small blue mark near the gate

allowedZones.description: Back in the ordinary real world at the everyday entrance of the new kindergarten — an ordinary, non-magical door. NO magical color gate is visible here. Outdoor daytime entrance.
stableGeometry: everyday entrance with no magical gate
the child at the threshold of the real door
visualAnchors: empty pocket where the button used to be

forbiddenDrift: bed, lamp, shelf, rug, pillows or other bedroom furniture
more than one Kim / duplicate or cloned chameleon
duplicate or cloned child / two children protagonists
solid wooden or iron fence-gate (the gate is shifting light-color, not wood or metal)
redesigning the color gate's form between pages (identity holds; only state changes)
clinic, hospital, or unrelated fantasy wilderness
any water body or wilderness landscape beside the kindergarten path
real-world kindergarten door appearing during the gate-world pages (4-13)
magical color gate appearing in the real-world pages (15-16)
transitionRules: Move forward only along the journey: kindergarten path -> color gate threshold -> color courtyard -> ordinary real-world kindergarten door.
Camera may move; each scene's set must not redesign between pages.
The color gate is the SAME gate every time it appears — only its state changes per the story (opening, empty circle, blue ring).
Outdoor path and gate scenes never become an indoor room.

scenes.label: The kindergarten path
scenes.description: Outdoor morning path toward the new kindergarten, bright but unfamiliar.

scenes.label: The color gate threshold
scenes.description: In front of the same magical color gate standing across the path. The courtyard is glimpsed only through openings in the gate.
visualAnchors: empty circle at the gate's center

scenes.label: The changing-color courtyard
scenes.description: Inside the soft changing-color courtyard reached just beyond the opened gate.
visualAnchors: small blue mark near the gate

scenes.label: The real kindergarten door
scenes.description: Back in the ordinary real world at the everyday, non-magical kindergarten door.

recurringObjects.label: the color gate
recurringObjects.identity: A standing STONE ARCHWAY across the kindergarten path; the opening of the arch is filled with a softly shifting RAINBOW field (green, yellow, pink and soft unnamed hues), and a small EMPTY CIRCLE sits at the very center of the arch, waiting to be filled. The SAME stone arch and the SAME central empty circle every appearance — only the colors and the state change, never the arch's design.
forbiddenDrift: solid wooden or iron gate (it is a stone arch with a rainbow center)
a different gate design per page
the central empty circle missing or relocated

stateTimeline.state: first appearance — the stone arch stands CLOSED across the path, its rainbow center shifting between green, yellow and pink, the empty circle at its center waiting
the rainbow center glows softly, colors drifting calmly within the same stone arch
a small opening in the rainbow field reveals the colorful courtyard beyond the arch
Kim perches on a low ridge of the stone arch
the empty circle at the center of the arch is clearly uncolored and waiting
the empty circle sits softly glowing at the center of the arch in the background
the small blue button is set INTO the empty circle at the center of the stone arch
a stable blue ring forms around the button; the rest of the rainbow field stays many-colored but calm
the stone arch OPENS just enough for one child and Kim to pass through

recurringObjects.label: the small blue button
recurringObjects.identity: A single small smooth blue button from the child's old sweater — the same button throughout, small enough to travel in a pocket.
forbiddenDrift: a different button color or size
a bead, coin, or gem instead of a button

stateTimeline.state: kept in the child's pocket, small and blue, fallen from the old sweater
shown on the child's open palm, close up
placed into the empty circle at the center of the color gate
embedded and stable inside the calm blue ring of the gate
left behind in the gate world — the child touches the empty pocket where it used to be (residue)

recurringObjects.label: the ordinary kindergarten door
recurringObjects.identity: The everyday, non-magical door of the new real-world kindergarten — a plain ordinary door, not a magical gate.
forbiddenDrift: magical color gate in place of the ordinary door

stateTimeline.state: the real kindergarten visible far ahead at the end of the path, bright but unfamiliar
an ordinary, non-magical kindergarten door — no color gate; the everyday entrance
the same ordinary door, now open as the child steps inside

forbiddenDrift: any indoor room or bedroom for path/gate/courtyard scenes
bedroom furniture (bed, lamp, shelf, rug, pillows)
swapping the magical gate and the ordinary door between the fantasy and real-world pages

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Camera may move closer or wider per PageShot; outdoor morning path holds.
pagePlans.pageAction: On the first morning, the child walks slowly along the outdoor path toward the new kindergarten, one hand in the pocket holding the small blue button. The kindergarten is visible far ahead. NO magical gate yet.

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Close 3-4 on Kim's first appearance; same outdoor path.
pagePlans.pageAction: Kim the chameleon appears beside a low stone on the path — green-purple mix, bright orange nose, mustard shoulder satchel. The child notices her. EXACTLY ONE Kim.

visibleAnchors: new kindergarten entrance at the path's end
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Side 3-4 looking down the path; same outdoor set.
pagePlans.pageAction: The child and Kim look down the path toward the new kindergarten entrance at its end. Kim's mustard satchel slips forward comically.

visibleAnchors: child and Kim small in front of the gate
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Wide; same color gate across the same path.
pagePlans.pageAction: A magical color gate of shifting light-colors blocks the path before the kindergarten, drifting between green, yellow, pink and soft hues. The child and Kim stand small in front of it on the path.

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Close 3-4 on the single Kim; in front of the same gate on the path.
forbiddenDrift: multiple Kims / a row of chameleons
pagePlans.pageAction: EXACTLY ONE Kim shimmers mid-transformation in front of the same color gate on the kindergarten path (NOT an indoor room) — one body washing green-to-yellow, orange nose and mustard satchel unchanged. The child watches, one child only.

visibleAnchors: Kim pointing at her orange nose
pagePlans.pageAction: The gate glows softly while Kim points proudly at her orange nose. The child smiles a little but keeps one hand tight in the pocket, still worried.

visibleAnchors: small opening in the color gate
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Over-the-shoulder through the gate opening; child remains outside on the path.
pagePlans.pageAction: Through a small opening in the gate, children inside the colorful courtyard receive small colored stripes yet stay clearly themselves. The child watches anxiously from the path, hand tight in pocket. Kim nearby.

visibleAnchors: Kim perched on a low ridge of the gate
pagePlans.pageAction: Kim perches on a low ridge of the color gate, mustard satchel caught on a tiny notch, looking down at the child with a steady, kind expression. Orange nose clear.

visibleAnchors: the color gate with a small empty uncolored spot at center
pagePlans.allowedVariation: 3-4; same gate, empty center spot revealed.
pagePlans.pageAction: Kim lands slightly crooked on the path after climbing down. The child notices a small empty round spot at the center of the shifting gate — clearly uncolored and waiting.

visibleAnchors: small blue button on the open palm
empty circle in the gate softly glowing behind
forbiddenDrift: button already placed in the gate
pagePlans.pageAction: Close-up of the child opening a palm to show the small smooth blue button. Kim leans close, orange nose and mustard satchel visible. The empty circle in the gate glows softly behind.

visibleAnchors: the child placing the blue button into the gate's empty circle
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Front 3-4 — main agency moment; same gate.
pagePlans.pageAction: Main agency moment. The child places the small blue button into the empty circle at the center of the shifting color gate. Kim watches proudly from below. The gate's colors move around the stable blue button.

visibleAnchors: stable blue ring forming around the button in the gate
the rest of the gate many-colored but calm
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Wide 3-4; same gate, blue ring stable.
pagePlans.pageAction: The gate settles as a small stable blue ring forms around the button. The rest of the gate stays many-colored but calm. The child visibly relaxes. Kim smiles.

visibleAnchors: the color gate opening just enough
Kim with a small new colored stripe
pagePlans.allowedVariation: 3-4; same gate, opening just enough to pass.
forbiddenDrift: Kim's orange nose or mustard satchel changing
pagePlans.pageAction: The gate opens just enough for the child and Kim. Kim walks through with a small new colored stripe on her body, while her orange nose and mustard satchel stay unchanged. The child follows, calmer.

visibleAnchors: small blue mark near the gate
pagePlans.allowedVariation: 3-4; inside the courtyard just beyond the gate.
pagePlans.pageAction: Inside the magical changing-color courtyard, one child notices the small blue mark near the gate. The child answers with quiet confidence while Kim sits nearby on a low step. The courtyard feels new but friendly.

visibleAnchors: empty pocket where the button used to be
pagePlans.allowedVariation: 3-4; ordinary real-world entrance, NO magical gate.
forbiddenDrift: the blue button still in the pocket
pagePlans.pageAction: Back in the real world. The child stands before the ordinary door of the new kindergarten, touching the pocket where the button used to be. Kim sits quietly nearby. NO magical gate visible.

visibleAnchors: the ordinary kindergarten door now open
pagePlans.pageAction: Final real-world entrance. The child opens the ordinary kindergarten door and steps inside. Kim perches near the child's shoulder, orange nose and mustard satchel visible. The child is still a little cautious but grounded.
